---
title: "Chris Varghese"
---

![](assets/cover_2.png){.front-figure fig-alt="Blue academic illustration of a campus with data science and AI motifs"}

::: {.intro}
I am a doctoral candidate at the University of Auckland, aspiring GI surgeon, and data scientist at Mayo Clinic. My interests include improving [surgical recovery](http://srslab.auckland.ac.nz/), [translational AI](https://www.mayo.edu/research/labs/surgical-artificial-intelligence-innovation/overview), and [GI physiology](https://www.alimetry.com/clinical-evidence-row).
:::


<!-- Edit this list to update the timeline. Use "icon": "research", "clinical", "degree", "data", or "future". Set "complete": false for future/dotted items. -->
<script type="application/json" id="timeline-data">
[
  {
    "date": "2019",
    "role": "BMedSc(Hons)",
    "place": "University of Auckland",
    "icon": "research"
  },
  {
    "date": "2021",
    "role": "Selective",
    "place": "General Surgery - Whangarei Hospital",
    "icon": "clinical"
  },
  {
    "date": "2022",
    "role": "Elective",
    "place": "Transplant & Colorectal - Auckland City Hospital",
    "icon": "clinical"
  },
  {
    "date": "2022",
    "role": "MBChB",
    "place": "University of Auckland",
    "icon": "degree"
  },
  {
    "date": "2023 – Present",
    "role": "PhD",
    "place": "University of Auckland",
    "icon": "research"
  },
  {
    "date": "2023",
    "role": "PGY1 House Officer",
    "place": "Middlemore Hospital",
    "icon": "clinical"
  },
  {
    "date": "2024",
    "role": "PGY2 House Officer",
    "place": "Auckland City/Middlemore Hospital",
    "icon": "clinical"
  },
  {
    "date": "2025 – Present",
    "role": "Data Scientist / Clinical Observer",
    "place": "Mayo Clinic",
    "icon": "data"
  },
  {
    "date": "Future",
    "role": "General Surgery Training",
    "place": "",
    "icon": "future",
    "complete": false
  }
]
</script>

<div class="timeline" id="timeline"></div>
<script src="assets/timeline.js"></script>

<div class="footer-links" aria-label="Profile links">
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=rsVXjrMAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Google Scholar">
    <img src="assets/google-scholar.svg" class="footer-icon" alt="">
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-varghese-3b499912a/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn">
    <img src="assets/linkedin.svg" class="footer-icon" alt="">
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Chris-Varghese-3?ev=hdr_xprf" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="ResearchGate">
    <img src="assets/researchgate.svg" class="footer-icon" alt="">
  </a>
</div>
